raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "performative self-affirmation enacting a commitment to mindset and behavioral shift from survival-oriented to growth-oriented functioning",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "current functioning is dominated by coping/survival rather than thriving",
    "binary opposition exists between coping and thriving",
    "choices can reliably produce nourishment, expansion, and normalized vitality",
    "vitality is a attainable default state rather than an exceptional one",
    "speaker possesses agency to enact this transition"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; statements form a consistent progression from contrast (thriving vs. coping) to agency (choices) to outcome (vitality as normal) without logical contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "speaker has basic safety and stability needs sufficiently met; statement is used as a deliberate, repeatable cognitive practice within a broader evidence-based therapeutic framework; realistic pathways exist for the referenced choices to influence outcomes",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "speaker faces active threat, deprivation, or clinical conditions where survival-focused coping remains necessary; statement functions to bypass or deny legitimate distress rather than integrate with adaptive action"
}
